title: T-031 — Assignment Side Panel (open on Gantt block click)
prompt:
# T-031 — Assignment Side Panel (open on Gantt block click)

PRD: 07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md §8.1 SCR-07-01, side panel, §3.4 approve/reject/override
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx:365-451 (`assignment_side_panel`)
UX: design/07-PLANNING-EXT-UX.md:392-426
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement side panel rendered on WO Gantt block click, showing WO details (materials, dependencies, allergen profile, changeover info) + actions [Approve] [Reject] [Override] [Reschedule WO].

## Implementation contract
1. New `apps/web/src/components/scheduler/AssignmentSidePanel.tsx` (shadcn Sheet) with controlled open/onOpenChange.
2. Loads WO + materials + dependencies via Server Action / Drizzle query helper (lazy-load on open).
3. Action buttons: Approve → POST approve (T-014); Reject → POST reject (T-016); Override → opens override_assignment_modal (T-033); Reschedule WO → opens reschedule_wo_modal (T-034).
4. Allergen + changeover info computed from changeover_matrix join.

## Files
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/AssignmentSidePanel.tsx [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/use-assignment-detail.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/AssignmentSidePanel.test.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Gantt block click event, when the panel opens, then it lazy-fetches WO detail (materials + dependencies) and renders 4 action buttons
2. Given the rendered panel, when compared to prototype design/Monopilot Design System/planning-ext/dashboard.jsx:365-451, then it has the same allergen warning section, the same 4 action buttons in the same order, and uses the same shadcn primitives (Sheet, Button, Badge) — parity verified by RTL snapshot + checklist (structural + visual + interaction)
3. Given Scheduling Officer role, when panel renders, then [Override] button is hidden (only Approve/Reject/Reschedule visible per §3.2 RBAC)

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/src/components/scheduler/__tests__/AssignmentSidePanel.test.tsx covering lazy load + parity + RBAC visibility
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test scheduler/AssignmentSidePanel'

## Risk red lines
- Do not load WO detail eagerly on Gantt page mount (must be lazy on panel open)
- Do not show [Override] button to Scheduling Officer
- Do not duplicate approve logic — call shared approve-action helper

pipeline_inputs.description: Lazy-loading side Sheet showing WO detail + 4 action buttons with RBAC-gated Override.
pipeline_inputs.details: shadcn Sheet (controlled). Lazy fetch on open. 4 actions wired to existing API endpoints. RBAC hides Override for Scheduling Officer. Parity with prototype enforced via RTL snapshot.
out_of_scope: Do not implement override modal here (T-033)
Do not implement reschedule modal here (T-034)
Do not implement run scheduler modal (T-032)
